title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released their V4 flagship model, which achieves significant reductions in inference compute and cost demands compared to prior versions. The video analyzes V4's approach to efficient inference and its implications for the open versus closed AI lab competition, highlighting how different incentive structures drive LLM development toward improved efficiency.
